period_rules.one_month_pct: 1 calendar month, first trading day on or after the anchor date
period_rules.three_month_pct: 3 calendar months, first trading day on or after the anchor date
period_rules.one_year_pct: 1 calendar year, first trading day on or after the anchor date
period_rules.three_year_pct: 3 calendar years, first trading day on or after the anchor date
period_rules.five_year_pct: 5 calendar years, first trading day on or after the anchor date
period_rules.ytd_pct: first trading day on or after January 1 of the latest series year

chart_range_rules.1M: 1 calendar month, first trading day on or after the anchor date
chart_range_rules.3M: 3 calendar months, first trading day on or after the anchor date
chart_range_rules.6M: 6 calendar months, first trading day on or after the anchor date
chart_range_rules.1Y: 1 calendar year, first trading day on or after the anchor date
chart_range_rules.3Y: 3 calendar years, first trading day on or after the anchor date
chart_range_rules.5Y: 5 calendar years, first trading day on or after the anchor date
